title: PTSL
description: A mod made to quickly and smoothly create code using Playground's Text Scripting Language.
body:
## Playground Text Scripting Language
### ⚠️ Designed to be used on playground.redstone.llc, support on other servers is not guaranteed at all
> Ever wanted to import or export a function instantly, well now you can!

## How do I use it?
> Fabric 1.21.4
> Dependencies:
> - Fabric API

## PTSL Plus
> You can download the VSCode extension here https://github.com/sinender/ptsl-plus/releases/tag/0.0.1, you install it like any other extension

> Tutorial on how to install and use autoimporting https://youtu.be/uQkekymuYy0
